provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly close-up detail study, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft directional lighting, worn and damaged sci-fi surface, extreme visible material texture and wear detail, visible brushstrokes, tight crop on surface detail, close-up of a frequently-used control panel — toggle switches with worn labeling, one replacement switch that doesn't match the others, fingerprint oils on the most-used buttons, scratch around a key slot from thousands of insertions, a stuck toggle with tape marked DO NOT TOUCH
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, wide shot, full environment, people, characters, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Surface texture/damage study showing the visual vocabulary of wear that defines gritty space.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in

canon_explanation: Approved: passes 7/7 constitution rules.  Surface texture/damage study showing the visual vocabulary of wear that defines gritty space.
